description_long: This is a low-top athletic shoe featuring a combination of dark gray and deep red panels, with a white rubber sole. The upper is constructed from what appears to be a synthetic or suede-like material, with red overlays on the heel, toe, and lace area, and dark gray on the sides and toe box. The shoe has black laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and a black pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The interior is lined with a dark material, likely fabric or mesh, for comfort and breathability. A visible logo and branding are present on the tongue, rendered in white, adding a sporty touch. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A modern, low-top athletic shoe with dark gray and deep red panels, black laces, and a white sole. Features a visible logo on the tongue and a sleek, sporty design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red and gray color blocking, white sole, and black laces, with the heel pull tab visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the black criss-cross laces, logo on the tongue, and the overall shape of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the red heel and toe overlays, gray midsection, and the clean white sole.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the red heel panel, white sole, and the black pull tab at the back.
attribute_logo: White geometric logo and text on the tongue, centrally placed.
